judge_reason: Description B provides specific, detailed text about a title, legend values, and caption that Description A does not mention, creating a factual inconsistency on the visual content.
original_image_tags: A line graph showing multiple data curves. The Y-axis is labeled "Percent in 5-deg sector (%)" on a logarithmic scale with tick marks at 0.1, 1, 10, and 100. The X-axis is labeled "Angle From Flight Path (deg)" on a linear scale with tick marks from 0 to 180 in increments of 20. The graph contains multiple lines representing different simulation parameters, all generally showing a decreasing trend as the angle increases. The curves start between 10% and 100% at 0 degrees and drop to between 0.1% and 1% by 180 degrees.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A line graph titled “Atlas IIAS Random-Attitude Failures through 280 sec” with y-axis “Percent in 5-deg sector (%)” and x-axis “Angle From Flight Path (deg),” showing multiple plotted curves and a legend for breakup q-alpha values (no breakup, 20,000, 10,000, 5,000) and B = 5,000,000 with A values 4.75, 5.65, 6.70, and 6.30; caption below reads “Figure 13. Atlas IIAS Simulation Results with B = 5,000,000.”*
